g.title: pump_pipeline
g.text: Untrusted mover + network-dead validator. Validation precedes the control plane seeing any byte. Fail-closed: malformed → dropped + flagged.

g.title: DS->ORCH
g.text: is not deserialized by the core

g.title: VAL
g.text: - NO pickle, NO Any, NO nesting

g.title: HONEST
g.text: PARSE-SAFE, NOT HONEST: the pump proves the
result is well-formed, not that it is true. A result
from a compromised detonation host can be a
schema-valid LIE - so a benign result never lowers
a verdict, and escape indicators floor the run

g.title: BLAST
g.text: IF THE VALIDATOR FALLS (residual R8): blast radius
bounded by the 2-process split (mover holds no
control creds) + continuous fuzzing + strict caps.
